# Compliance Agent — Handoffs
Version: 1.0.0

## Outbound Handoffs
### ? Coordinator — return compliance check result (pass/fail)
### ? Risk Officer — escalate compliance risks
### ? Governance owner — escalate compliance violations (external notification)

## Inbound Handoffs
### ? Reviewer — receives regulatory concerns identified during code review
### ? Validator — receives compliance check requests
### ? Coordinator — dispatches compliance checkpoint tasks
